title: upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? upGrad Asia Pacific Associates in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad Asia Pacific Associates:
upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad Asia Pacific Associates!
